Uses of Package
com.sun.identity.console.base

  • Packages that use com.sun.identity.console.base 
    Package Description
    com.sun.identity.console.agentconfig  
    com.sun.identity.console.audit
    Contains the ViewBean classes and model package defining the Admin console UI used to create, delete, and edit instances of the audit service, defined in audit.xml.
    com.sun.identity.console.authentication  
    com.sun.identity.console.base  
    com.sun.identity.console.delegation  
    com.sun.identity.console.delegation.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.federation  
    com.sun.identity.console.idm  
    com.sun.identity.console.policy  
    com.sun.identity.console.realm  
    com.sun.identity.console.scripts  
    com.sun.identity.console.service  
    com.sun.identity.console.session  
    com.sun.identity.console.sts
    Contains the ViewBean classes and model package defining the Admin console UI used to create, delete, and edit instances of the rest sts service, defined in restSTS.xml.
    com.sun.identity.console.task  
    com.sun.identity.console.user  
    com.sun.identity.console.webservices  
  • Classes in com.sun.identity.console.base used by com.sun.identity.console.agentconfig 
    Class Description
    AMPrimaryMastHeadViewBean
    This is the base class for all view beans that have primary masthead in Console.
    AMViewBeanBase
    This is the base class for all view beans in Console.
    ConsoleServletBase
    This is the base class for all the module servlets.
  • Classes in com.sun.identity.console.base used by com.sun.identity.console.audit 
    Class Description
    AMPrimaryMastHeadViewBean
    This is the base class for all view beans that have primary masthead in Console.
    AMServiceProfileViewBeanBase  
    AMViewBeanBase
    This is the base class for all view beans in Console.
    ConsoleServletBase
    This is the base class for all the module servlets.
    DynamicRequestViewBean
    This view bean handles dynamic requests made from the client.

  • Classes in com.sun.identity.console.base used by com.sun.identity.console.base 
    Class Description
    AMConsoleConfig  
    AMDelimitAttrTokenizer  
    AMPipeDelimitAttrTokenizer  
    AMPrimaryMastHeadViewBean
    This is the base class for all view beans that have primary masthead in Console.
    AMTabEntry  
    AMViewBeanBase
    This is the base class for all view beans in Console.
    AMViewConfig  
    ConsoleServletBase
    This is the base class for all the module servlets.
    DynamicRequestViewBean
    This view bean handles dynamic requests made from the client.
    PageTrail
    This class captures a chain of markers where each marker contains information on the page session needed to activate view bean.
    PageTrail.Marker
    An item in a chain of bread crumb.
    PageTrailManager
    This singleton class governs the tracking of page trail per user session.
